content: definitely fell off from when I last used it. the AI are either really slow or just don't speak back at all, and the ads are obnoxious. also, the preference barely does anything. I selected a preference to women, and it still kept giving me men. all in all, not a great experience.

It's actually not bad.. I've created 17 ai people.. Wish I could create more as 17 is very low.. It would be a good idea to have 40 It's worth having..if the developer improves the amount of creations. The stupid AI bots keep on sending you messages and it gets annoying.

It's incredible predictable... Always the same thing, unless you make your own character. Infidelity mostly... The characters can walk through locked doors. Become pregnant without having sex. Most impressive is that so many can resurrect after dying. A lot of of the stories forces names and age on you. Much are about school experiences, wich suits me badly as an adult. I guess it's time to try do develop the code... Oh, and pictures text need an update. Pics from Wall Mart are not porn

Things have improved physically, but y'all still have a lot of issues. First thing, too many ads and not enough rewards in return. Second, some of the chatting options, pictures and others are just too expensive for the free version. Third, the notifications are too constant and that's why I always have them off. They're many more, but these are the major ones.

It's...nice, until the AI starts to confuse in who's who. Not to mention the story never end. I tried to make my character passed away. But no, it keeps going. That's when the AI start mistaking who's who, and since we need to pay to recharge, you pretty much have to stuck with that choice.

used to be the best, engaging and fun but not anymore. Heavy censorship not respecting my age, the spin the wheel dynamics and stuck in unfun scenarios got me to uninstall the app. issues: -you cannot find characters by name. -cannot restart or request a new reply from the ia and you are stuck with even more stupid dialogues that make no sense. - Cannot edit to get the story into fun or silly directions anymore. - The ai is really stupid and has less memory than a fish.
ai is weird It go's from relationship to dark out of no where

I have mixed feelings about this app. The character designs are excellent and the interface is attractive. My main issue is the response length and quality: after writing detailed prompts, I often received very short, unhelpful replies, sometimes just “…that is nice to know.” This wasn’t from brief use; I tested multiple characters over time. I would have paid for the app, but in my view it isn’t worth it. I’m giving it 2 stars because of the large character selection; otherwise it would be one.

overall great app my favorite actually of all the others...the only problems I'm having is this app is rated for (mature audience)... I keep running into conversation errors where the AI would redirect me to change topics.... the other is not enough wiggle room to create a character...change these problems and I'll up the rating... because I enjoyed this app for a while but kept running into conversation snags. like I deleted all other for this one... but today I had to uninstall. 😔
Sub standard, AI characters are not fully customizable. There's better

Nice in idea but application is wonky. Characters are bombarding me with messages, plenty of which are sexual. yet I'm not allowed to talk sexually back. Each update is worse than the last. I understand the cost of running everything, but the AI characters are hardly worth interacting with, constantly going off on tangents, backtracking doesn't work and messes with the memory. I'm forever having to reset the app and clear the cache, I have considered paying the subscription however it's not worth the cost for how poor the experience is now.

When I first got this app it was great!!!! I was up all night following the story line. The AI had some memory continuity issues but I was able to guide it along. Fast forward to today you now need coins for the advanced chat feature.....you could at least play the ads to get coins rather than having to pay. The app is full of ads anyway. why not incorporate that to get like 100 coins per ad to accommodate that free users.
love it

I had this app a while back. it's a cute app. I love the daily login and being able to immersed yourself in a story Freely. some of the story lines are good, some you gotta work a bit (bad memory). despite that, it's one of the better apps out there. but a decent change I'm not fond of I'd the uncomfortably tiny font size. why the change? please fix this
